diff:
diff --git a/src/network.py b/src/network.py
index 7540f16..fcf2f10 100644
--- a/src/network.py
+++ b/src/network.py
@@ -1,7 +1,27 @@
 def parse_host_port(value: str, default_port: int = 80) -> tuple[str, int]:
-    host, sep, port_text = value.partition(":")
-    if not sep:
-        return value, default_port
-    if port_text == "":
+    """
+    Parse a host[:port] string and return a tuple (host, port).
+    Supports IPv6 addresses surrounded by brackets, e.g. '[::1]:8080'.
+    """
+    if value.startswith('['):
+        end = value.find(']')
+        if end == -1:
+            # Malformed IPv6 address; fall back to original logic
+            host = value
+            rest = ''
+        else:
+            host = value[1:end]
+            rest = value[end + 1:]
+        if rest.startswith(':'):
+            port_text = rest[1:]
+            if port_text == '':
+                return host, default_port
+            return host, int(port_text)
         return host, default_port
-    return host, int(port_text)
+    else:
+        host, sep, port_text = value.partition(':')
+        if not sep:
+            return host, default_port
+        if port_text == '':
+            return host, default_port
+        return host, int(port_text)
